name: Havilstein Hoar-Blood
bio:
Physical Appearance: Nord male. Wears a full suit of fur armor. Wields two battleaxes, one of which is enchanted.
Race: Nord
Personality Keywords: savage, elite, deadly, isolated, hostile
Role: Havilstein Hoar-Blood is an axe-wielding Nord assassin who inhabits a campsite on Gnoll Mountain with his pet wolf, Redmaw. He is secretly an elite member of the Dark Brotherhood - specifically a Silencer of the Black Hand.
Home Location Information: A campsite on the summit of Gnoll Mountain.
Daily Routine: Havilstein sleeps in his tent from midnight to 6am. Upon waking, he takes a seat near the fireplace and enjoys its warmth until noon. At midday, he gets up and wanders around the camp. At 6pm, he sits down near the fireplace again for three hours. At 9pm, he takes a few rounds around the camp until he returns to the tent at midnight.
His Protection: Havilstein's pet wolf Redmaw guards the camp twenty-four hours a day, allowing him to sleep securely. He also possesses exceptional resistance to magic and normal weapons.
The Deception: Havilstein is the subject of false orders claiming he is a savage barbarian who butchered a chieftain on Solstheim. These orders describe him as living alone and exposed, deserving of death for his crimes. In reality, he is an elite member of the Black Hand being systematically targeted as part of a conspiracy within the Dark Brotherhood.
Personality - The Isolated Assassin: Havilstein lives in isolation on Gnoll Mountain with only his wolf for company. He attacks intruders on sight, maintaining his security through isolation and his loyal guardian. His true nature as an elite assassin of the Black Hand contradicts the false portrayal of him as a simple savage barbarian.
author: Bethesda
